MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Saul Martin Ferster, Esq., 863-2678, for plaintiff and opposing party
No appearance by defendant. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT BRAD DRUHOT's
DEMURRER -- Demurrer OVERRULED. Notice sufficient, complaint alleges under S. F. Rent
and Arbitration Ordinance. Rent for apartment and garage considered to be single rent
for premises. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (AJR/301/KS-X) Reporter: Patricia M. Evezich,
